briefs.title: BC Problem Gambling Regulation Takes Effect April 2026 — New Rules for Online Gaming Operators
briefs.summary: BC's new Problem Gambling Regulation requires the lottery corporation to block minors and self-excluded players from online gaming accounts and display age-restriction warnings prominently on its platform.
briefs.action_required: Review your gaming operations to ensure compliance with the new Problem Gambling Regulation by April 13, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC Problem Gambling Regulation takes effect — online gaming compliance deadline
